name: eslint-plugin-css-modules-class-checker
description: ESLint and Oxlint plugin for CSS Modules class checking.

scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run --root ../.. packages/eslint-plugin/tests && oxlint -c tests/fixtures/oxlint-plugin/oxlint.config.ts tests/fixtures/oxlint-plugin/src && oxlint -c tests/fixtures/oxlint-plugin/oxlint.rules-off.config.ts tests/fixtures/oxlint-plugin/rules-off
